summary: Iteration 59: Video Gallery page and StarChart refactoring tested. All features working correctly. Videos page at /videos has two tabs (Cosmic Cinema with 15 Sora 2 stories, Practice Videos with category filters). StarChart.js successfully imports from StarChartOverlays.js and StarChartAudio.js. Backend APIs all pass (19/19 tests).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 59 complete. Video Gallery page verified: (1) Videos page loads at /videos with two tab buttons. (2) Cosmic Cinema tab is default, shows 'Powered by Sora 2' info bar with x/15 generated counter. (3) 15 cinema cards displayed with culture names and region info. (4) Cards with cached videos (Mayan, Norse) show 'Watch Cinematic' button and SORA 2 badge. (5) Uncached cards show 'Generate Video' button. (6) Video player modal opens with video element, controls, and story info. (7) Practice Videos tab shows video list with category filters (Mudras, Yantra, Tantra, etc.). StarChart refactoring verified: (8) StarChart.js loads with 3D canvas. (9) Imports from StarChartOverlays.js work (CelestialBadgesPanel, MythologyPanel, etc.). (10) Imports from StarChartAudio.js work (useCosmicAmbient). (11) All control buttons functional (Mythology toggle, Badges, World Skies, Location, Gyro). (12) No console errors related to imports. Navigation works correctly via direct URLs.

backend_api.GET /api/ai-visuals/video-stories: PASS - returns 15 stories with has_video boolean

frontend_videos_page.Culture names and regions: PASS (Mayan - Central America, Egyptian - North Africa, etc.)
frontend_videos_page.Story info in modal: PASS (culture name, region, AI Cinematic label)
frontend_videos_page.Category filters: PASS (All Videos, Mudras, Yantra, Tantra, etc.)

component_refactoring_verified.StarChartOverlays.js: Contains BirthConstellationToast, MythologyPanel, JourneyOverlay, JourneyComplete, CelestialBadgesPanel
component_refactoring_verified.Imports working: All imports from extracted components verified working
